## Type of change

## Quality checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No placeholder content left in changed files
- [ ] Accessibility checked (keyboard navigation, colour contrast)
- [ ] Responsive layout checked (mobile + desktop)
